## Checklist

- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` is clean
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the changed behavior
- [ ] No `as any` casts or ad-hoc `generation === N` branches (enforced by `tests/scalabilityLint.test.ts`)
- [ ] No real save files or copyrighted game data added to the repo or PR
